name: vitest
purpose: Fast unit test runner for the functional core, validation logic, importers, and deterministic simulation tests.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view vitest@4.1.9 license repository.url time --json` reported license `MIT` and repository `git+https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: Vitest is the selected fast test runner in PLAN.md and is maintained in the Vite ecosystem.
